b2-vix-reversion.name: b2-vix-reversion
b2-vix-reversion.mechanism: Volatility spikes overshoot because protection is bought at any price; when VIX closes far above its recent norm vol sellers re-enter and equities rebound next session

scan-mbt.name: mbt-nr7 (bitcoin)
scan-mbt.mechanism: MARKET-EXPANSION SCAN of MBT (micro bitcoin): the five validated mechanism configs (monday, nr7, prehol, vix-rebound, open-drive) run natively; each market is judged on its own merits per Daniel's scope-opening order — no cross-market consistency required, and every config counted as a trial

b3-nr7-breakout.name: b3-nr7-breakout
b3-nr7-breakout.mechanism: Volatility compression precedes expansion; a break out of the narrowest range in 7 days carries real information

b10-nagel-vix-reversal.name: b10-nagel-vix-reversal
b10-nagel-vix-reversal.mechanism: Short-horizon reversal is the return to liquidity provision and spikes when intermediaries retreat (high VIX) — you are paid to absorb urgency when it is scarcest (Nagel RFS 2012)

b3-monday-long.name: b3-monday-long
b3-monday-long.mechanism: Weekend risk premium and Monday retail inflows favor longs at the week open; the shelf's Monday sleeve has never been honestly measured on real data

b3-preholiday-drift.name: b3-preholiday-drift
b3-preholiday-drift.mechanism: Documented pre-holiday drift: shorts cover and liquidity providers mark up ahead of exchange closures

b4-open-drive.name: b4-open-drive
b4-open-drive.mechanism: An open-drive (three one-directional opening bars closing at the extreme) is initiative institutional flow that does not revert intraday

rep-bondflight-mes.name: rep-bondflight-mes
rep-bondflight-mes.mechanism: Flight-to-quality unwind is a market-wide equity phenomenon and must appear on MES if the treasury fear gauge is real

b2-opex-release.name: b2-opex-release
b2-opex-release.mechanism: Monthly options expiry pins price to dealer gamma into early afternoon; when hedges roll off the pin releases and the afternoon break trends into the close

b3-tom-long.name: b3-tom-long
b3-tom-long.mechanism: Pension/401k inflows cluster at month boundaries and are price-insensitive buyers; long the turn-of-month sessions

fomc-statement-presser-reversal.name: fomc-statement-presser-reversal
fomc-statement-presser-reversal.mechanism: FOMC releases information in two stages: the 14:00 ET statement, then the 14:30 ET press conference. The 14:00-14:30 move is priced off statement text alone by fast algorithmic readers with no chair commentary, and the presser routinely revises that reading, so the first-stage move is systematically over-extended relative to the full information set. We are paid by whoever had to take the first-stage risk.

b3-prior-high-break.name: b3-prior-high-break
b3-prior-high-break.mechanism: Stops cluster above the prior-day high; the first break runs them and continues

rep-nagel-mes.name: rep-nagel-mes
rep-nagel-mes.mechanism: Liquidity-provision reversal premium is market-wide and must appear on MES when VIX is elevated

b6-monday-m2k.name: b6-monday-m2k
b6-monday-m2k.mechanism: Weekend equity risk premium should extend to small-caps (Russell): Monday-long on M2K

b6-vix-m2k.name: b6-vix-m2k
b6-vix-m2k.mechanism: VIX fear-overshoot rebounds should extend to Russell since small-caps are typically MORE sensitive to risk-appetite swings

rep3-vix-mes.name: rep3-vix-mes
rep3-vix-mes.mechanism: VIX fear-overshoot is market-wide: must appear on MES

b6-prehol-m2k.name: b6-prehol-m2k
b6-prehol-m2k.mechanism: Pre-holiday drift comes from US equity market liquidity withdrawal and short-covering, which applies to small-caps as much as tech

mcl-carry-regime.name: mcl-carry-regime
mcl-carry-regime.mechanism: Crude oil term structure prices the inventory / convenience-yield state: in backwardation inventories are tight and producers pay long speculators a positive risk premium to carry hedged exposure, while in contango that premium reverses and storage holders are paid instead. Signing MCL direction off the front-versus-deferred basis therefore harvests a producer-hedging risk premium rather than any event reaction, per Gorton and Rouwenhorst and Erb and Harvey.

silver-london-to-comex-handoff.name: silver-london-to-comex-handoff
silver-london-to-comex-handoff.mechanism: Silver price discovery happens in London physical (LBMA) hours and that bid carries into the US pre-open; once COMEX paper hours open, industrial hedgers and dealers press supply back into the session where size actually trades. The payer is the London-hours inventory holder who must transfer inventory risk into the US session.

zn-sunday-reopen-duration-unwind.name: zn-sunday-reopen-duration-unwind
zn-sunday-reopen-duration-unwind.mechanism: Duration hedges accumulated over the weekend close-out into the first liquidity of the trading week: the Sunday 18:00 ET Globex reopen is the only scheduled moment when a global rates book can be adjusted before Tokyo cash is fully staffed, so sellers of protection meet almost no depth and pay a concession to get out, pushing ZN down in the first two hours. Known neighbour and primary kill hypothesis: the dead mcl-weekend-insurance-roundtrip shares the weekend-hedge logic in a different asset class.

decisions.title: Slippage collector: fill Tradovate demo creds in the local .env, then approve
decisions.recommendation: Fill ~/mnq_lab/scheduler/.env yourself, then Approve with note 'creds in place'
decisions.evidence: Second consecutive empty approval on this card. Verified at apply time: scheduler/.env has TRADOVATE_USER=, TRADOVATE_PASS=, TRADOVATE_CID=, TRADOVATE_SEC= all blank; TRADOVATE_DEMO=1; MNQ_LIVE=0. Step 2 of the approved sequence was run for real - scheduler/orb.sh test-connection exited rc=1 with TradovateError 'Tradovate creds not set'. No auth, no account lookup, no orders. scheduler/slippage.jsonl does not exist: 0 of the 100 target samples collected. The collector machinery itself is unchanged and still hand-verified. Second blocker also unchanged: the 09:30-09:45 OR levels are not wired (Tradovate market data is a WebSocket feed), so ORB_OR_HI/ORB_OR_LO must be set by hand each arm.
decisions.what_yes_means: The four values land in scheduler/.env, --test-connection is re-run, and only if it passes does MNQ_LIVE flip to 1
decisions.recap: Paper routing is approved and the collector is built. The last blocker is four empty Tradovate demo values in a private file on your Mac. Never type credentials into this website — fill the file locally, then approve.
decisions.why: Credentials in the website note would travel through a third-party relay in plain text. The .env file is chmod-600 on your machine and every bot launcher already reads it — same place your other bot secrets live.
steps: Fill TRADOVATE_USER / TRADOVATE_PASS (demo login) and TRADOVATE_CID / TRADOVATE_SEC (API access page); save
Tap Approve on this card with note: creds in place
Engine re-runs the connection test; if it passes, paper orders start routing and slippage samples begin counting
Samples appear on the dashboard; ~100 samples retires the bot for good

qa.q: Approve: Neo-300 paper bot — retire or repurpose as slippage collector
qa.a: Approved by Daniel 2026-07-21. Repurpose executed: the bot's strategy is flagged dead and its signals are no longer to be acted on; slippage_collector.py is built, hand-verified and wired into arm/flatten. Blocker found on execution: MNQ_LIVE=0 and no Tradovate credentials, so 0 fills can be observed. This card holds for the GO to route paper orders.

qa.q: Approve: enable paper routing so the slippage collector has fills to measure
qa.a: Approved by Daniel 2026-07-22T02:19:12Z, note EMPTY. Step 1 of the approved sequence was not satisfied: scheduler/.env still has TRADOVATE_USER/PASS/CID/SEC blank (verified at apply time). Step 2 was executed anyway to get a hard result: scheduler/orb.sh test-connection exited rc=1 with TradovateError 'Tradovate creds not set: TRADOVATE_USER, TRADOVATE_PASS, TRADOVATE_CID, TRADOVATE_SEC'. Because step 3 is gated on step 2 passing, MNQ_LIVE was left at 0 and no order routing was enabled. Slippage samples collected: 0 (scheduler/slippage.jsonl does not exist). Nothing proceeds until the four values arrive.

decisions.title: Two approved demotions are on the ledger but the published book still lists both sleeves
decisions.recommendation: Approve a two-file edit to the dashboard mirrors so the site and sizing drop the demoted sleeves
decisions.evidence: Book membership is hard-coded in three places: ~/mnq_lab/dashboard/build_dashboard.py (VALID - updated, now 6 hashes), ~/neo-dashboard/build_data.py (VALID) and ~/neo-dashboard/sizing.py (VALIDATED / RARE / XMKT). The executor's write scope is limited to ~/mnq_lab and ~/neo-engine/state, so the last two were not touched. Pending: scan-mcl (mcl-vix, crude) - approved for removal 2026-07-22, hash 6153da5cd4762a99; scan-mym (mym-prehol, Dow) - approved for removal 2026-07-22, hash 5eec72170531044e
decisions.what_yes_means: The two dashboard files drop both demoted hashes/ids, sizing re-runs, and the published book, bundles and $10k roadmap finally recompute on 6 sleeves
decisions.recap: You approved pulling two sleeves (crude vix-rebound and Dow pre-holiday) from the book and both are on the ledger as DEMOTED. The public dashboard hasn't caught up: its copy of the book list lives in files the executor isn't allowed to edit, so the site still shows 8 sleeves and still gives each demoted one a micro.
decisions.why: The ledger is the source of truth and it already says DEMOTED, so the record is right - but the screen you actually read is driven by a duplicated list, which means the sizing, bundle and roadmap figures on the site are currently overstated by two sleeves. Rather than silently edit a public repo the engine auto-pushes, the engine asks first. It is a few-line change plus a sizing re-run.
steps: Remove scan-mcl and scan-mym from ~/neo-dashboard/sizing.py VALIDATED (and the RARE / XMKT lists)
Re-run sizing.py, then build_data.py; engine pushes on its next publish
Book, bundles and the $10k roadmap recompute on the 6 remaining sleeves - the totals go DOWN
Deny: both ledger demotions still stand, but the dashboard keeps displaying the sleeves as book slots
pending_mirrors: scan-mcl (mcl-vix, crude) - approved for removal 2026-07-22, hash 6153da5cd4762a99
scan-mym (mym-prehol, Dow) - approved for removal 2026-07-22, hash 5eec72170531044e

decisions.title: Apex — third empty approval; type the numbers, or Deny to drop Apex entirely
decisions.recommendation: Either type the five values in the box BEFORE tapping 'Send approval', or Deny to re-plan without Apex
decisions.evidence: Three approvals now received with an empty note (d-apex-verify 2026-07-21T22:16Z, d-apex-verify-numbers 2026-07-22T02:19Z, d-apex-verify-numbers-r2 2026-07-22T02:55Z). The command path was audited this run and is working: the page sends the textarea text, the inbox forwards it, the executor prompt shows no instructions clause — so the box was genuinely empty, the note was not lost. Apex blocks bots, so the engine still has no verified value. Apex-150K remains ASSUMED exactly as in 114_apex_sim.py: start 150,000 / target 159,000 / EOD trailing buffer 4,000 / floor freezes at 150,000. Profit split, consistency %% and max-accounts are still not modelled at all — gauntlet/account.py PLANS contains only growth / select_flex / select_daily / lightning (all Tradeify), no apex150 (re-verified at apply time).
decisions.what_yes_means: Numbers typed in the box -> engine builds a VERIFIED apex150 plan and re-runs all Apex sizings
decisions.recap: You tapped Approve a third time with the note box empty, so no Apex numbers reached the engine and nothing changed. Two ways to clear this card: type the five values into the box and send, or tap Deny — Deny drops Apex from the $10k route and re-plans on the Tradeify plans that are already verified.
decisions.why: Approving is not the missing input — the values are, and three bare approvals have now supplied none. The engine cannot open Apex's site (bot-blocked), so every Apex figure on this dashboard is still the assumption set from 114_apex_sim.py, and split / consistency / max-accounts were never modelled. Promoting assumptions to 'verified' on a bare approval would be inventing numbers. Rather than re-staging the same ask a fourth time, this card now carries a one-tap exit: if chasing Apex's rules isn't worth it, Deny and the route gets re-planned on verified plans only.
steps: APPROVE path: log in to Apex, open the 150K account rules

Type all five INTO the box that opens under 'Approve…', then tap 'Send approval', e.g.: 1) trailing threshold $ = ____  2) trailing intraday or EOD = ____  3) consistency rule %% = ____  4) profit split %% = ____  5) max accounts = ____
Engine adds a verified 'apex150' plan to gauntlet/account.py PLANS using exactly those values
All Apex sizings, bundles and first-payout estimates re-run against the verified plan
ASSUMED chips are removed only for the fields you supply; anything skipped stays flagged ASSUMED
DENY path (no typing): engine removes Apex from the $10k account route and re-plans using only the verified Tradeify plans, and this card retires for good

qa.q: Approve: Apex account verification before any funding
qa.a: Approved by Daniel 2026-07-21. Approval recorded in ledger.jsonl; no rule values were included, so no Apex number was changed. Card replaced with this one, which holds until the five values arrive.

qa.q: Approve: Apex verification — paste the five numbers
qa.a: Approved 2026-07-22T02:19:04Z with an EMPTY note, so no value was supplied for the second time. No Apex parameter changed, no ASSUMED chip removed, no sizing re-run. Card re-staged with a copy-paste template.

qa.q: Approve: Apex verification — paste the five numbers (r2)
qa.a: Approved 2026-07-22T02:55:26Z with an EMPTY note — third consecutive bare approval. Audited the command path this time (dashboard sendDecision -> ntfy -> inbox.py -> decision_prompt): it forwards the note correctly, so the box was empty rather than the text being lost. No Apex parameter changed, no ASSUMED chip removed, no sizing re-run. Card re-staged as r3 with a Deny escape hatch so it can be closed without typing.

roadmap.disclaimer: All figures simulation-tier until live fills.
